data.content: Implementation review approved. 5 tests in terminal-manager-step-failure-rollback.test.ts correctly verify: (1) non-zero exit triggers enforceQueueTerminalInvariant rollback, (2) take-loop step failure triggers rollback with reason message, (3) initial child non-zero exit on take-loop triggers invariant enforcement, (4) post-rollback state is claimable with clean session termination, (5) concurrent abort during in-flight rollback sets status to aborted. All tests pass, no lint errors in the file, typecheck clean. Mock setup accurately reflects terminal-manager.ts internals.
